summary: The diff implements a comprehensive static frontend for Magic Hair Salon covering all four requirements: a hero section (REQ-1), services section (REQ-2), location/contact section (REQ-3), and luxurious visual theme (REQ-4). All major acceptance criteria appear to be addressed. Some non-essential boilerplate (Internet Identity, useActor, backend/main.mo) is present but does not conflict with the static-only constraint functionally.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity authentication infrastructure included (useInternetIdentity hook, InternetIdentityProvider, useActor hook, QueryClientProvider) even though the build request explicitly states no user authentication or login is needed and only static frontend is required.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request non-goals explicitly exclude user authentication or login, and the constraint says 'Use only static frontend — no backend logic needed.' These authentication hooks and providers are unused by the salon UI but add unnecessary complexity.
